commands.review_summary:
The PR adds sender identity and quoted-reply fields to the WhatsApp inboundLogger.info payload.

PR surface: Source +6. Total +6 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main computes the participant and reply fields on the queued inbound message but the inboundLogger.info payload only logs the basic fields; I did not run a live WhatsApp repro in this read-only review.
